description: Letter of recommendation concerning one of the chief people in Sunbat, who had to flee because he could not afford to pay his own and his son's capitation tax. (Mentioned by N. Golb in Journal of Near Eastern Studies 33 [1974], p. 142)
description_he: מכתב המלצה על אחד מראשי אנשי סונבאט שנאלץ לברוח כי לא יכול לשלם את מס הגולגולת שלו ושל בנו.
